## Recipes.RecipesLibrary class

Multi-source recipe library with type-safe access

Wraps AggregatedResultMap to provide: - Composite ID access (e.g., "user.classic-ganache") - Multi-source management (built-in, user, app-local, etc.) - Mutable vs immutable collection distinction - Weakly-typed validating access for external data

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare class RecipesLibrary extends SubLibraryBase<RecipeId, BaseRecipeId, Recipe> 
```
**Extends:** [SubLibraryBase](./ts-chocolate.librarydata.sublibrarybase.md)<!-- -->&lt;[RecipeId](./ts-chocolate.recipeid.md)<!-- -->, [BaseRecipeId](./ts-chocolate.baserecipeid.md)<!-- -->, [Recipe](./ts-chocolate.recipes.recipe.md)<!-- -->&gt;
